title: maxillaria pyhalae
intro: Maxillaria pyhalae, also known as the orchid tree or the yellow orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Maxillaria pyhalae include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system, making it a valuable resource in folk medicine. Herbal preparations of Maxillaria pyhalae are typically made by boiling the plant's roots and leaves in water to create a tea or infusion, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
